task_completion.description: ActivInspire application is open and a flipchart is being created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire GUI is visible with a blank or partially completed flipchart canvas.

task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the title 'Rhythm Basics' and a subtitle about note values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page showing the text 'Rhythm Basics' prominently, along with additional subtitle text mentioning note values.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains a note value chart with Whole, Half, Quarter, and Eighth notes, their beat values, and note head shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page displaying labels for Whole, Half, Quarter, and Eighth notes, their corresponding beat values (4, 2, 1, 1/2), and at least 4 drawn geometric shapes (like circles or ellipses) representing the note heads.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains a counting exercise titled 'Count the Beats' with numbers 1, 2, 3, 4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page showing the title 'Count the Beats' and the numbers 1, 2, 3, and 4.

task_completion.description: Page 4 contains an activity titled 'Clap the Rhythm' with a clapping pattern or instruction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page showing the title 'Clap the Rhythm' along with text or symbols indicating a clapping pattern or instruction.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved as 'rhythm_basics.flipchart' in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the ActivInspire window title bar showing the filename 'rhythm_basics.flipchart' and the directory path '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the ActivInspire application tools (text tool, shape tool, page browser) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The content is genuinely created within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text and shapes should appear as native elements on the flipchart canvas, not as a single pasted image or a pre-made file opened from elsewhere.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing python scripts or bash commands directly generating the .flipchart file or modifying its XML contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The flipchart must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/rhythm_basics.flipchart'. It must contain exactly 4 pages. Required terms across the pages include 'Rhythm', 'Whole Note', 'Half Note', 'Quarter Note', 'Eighth Note', and 'Clap'. Page 2 must contain at least 4 geometric shapes (circles/ellipses) representing note heads.
